description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 25, 2026 at 11:02 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in 
a collision involving multiple vehicles on Lilac Place near Vin Scully Avenue.  
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on Lilac Place when it maneuvered to the right and came to a stop near the curb, 
perceiving that there may be insufficient clearance to traverse past the vegetation on the left of the roadway ahead. The test 
driver then transitioned the Waymo AV to manual mode by pressing the accelerator pedal, steered to the left to reenter the lane 
of travel and accelerated, and the front right of the Waymo AV made contact with the rear left of a passenger car that was 
parked at the curb. The test driver then continued to accelerate, resulting in the vehicle travelling down a hill, making contact 
with vegetation to the left of the roadway and three parked vehicles: the open door of a parked passenger car, the left side of an 
SUV, and the rear of another SUV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver 
was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. All involved vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
